title: Usopp Is Hurt
description: Franky becomes the central enemy in Water Seven as his gang, the stolen money, and the ship crisis converge.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Luffy, Usopp, Nami, Zoro, Chopper. Franky becomes the central enemy in Water Seven as his gang, the stolen money, and the ship crisis converge.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Let's talk about which ship to buy.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We just don't have enough money. Right?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I would never make that decision otherwise!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'm not kidding. It's the truth!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Be it giant waves or deadly sea-battle

summary: Franky becomes the central enemy in Water Seven as his gang, the stolen money, and the ship crisis converge.
